items.title: There are only two cities I've been to where I could really feel history's presence — unrelentingly: Berlin and Belfast. Hope things settle down in Belfast ASAP, and that the people responsible for stoking tensions are held accountable, although I don't have high hopes.

items.body_excerpt: There are only two cities I've been to where I could really feel history's presence — unrelentingly: Berlin and Belfast. Hope things settle down in Belfast ASAP, and that the people responsible for stoking tensions are held accountable, although I don't have high hopes.

New York held the Spurs to an offensive rating of 101.0 over the first two games of the NBA Finals—18.6 points lower than their regular season mark of 119.6.

In Game 3, San Antonio finally had a nearly exactly average offensive output in Game 3 and led the entire 4th quarter.

Who takes Game 4?

items.title: “I’m just like the loudest fan.” 🎶
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
“I’m just like the loudest fan.” 🎶 

Tucked at the top of Madison Square Garden… Knicks organist Ray Castoldi has been providing the live arena soundtrack at Knicks home games since 1989. And now, for the third time, he gets to do so for the NBA Finals.
